name: @metorial/control-d
description: Manage DNS filtering profiles, custom rules, and traffic redirection. Create and configure profiles with filters (ads, trackers, adult content, etc.), block or redirect 400+ specific services, and define custom domain-level rules including blocking, allowing, spoofing, and proxying. Manage devices/endpoints and assign profiles with scheduled swapping. Control IP-based access authorization, configure analytics logging, browse proxy locations for traffic redirection, and manage organizations and sub-organizations. Retrieve account, billing, and subscription information.
